name: Absolute Wonder Woman  [Welcome to the Wild Isle]
description:
[Welcome to the Wild Isle]

[Thumbnail Credit: @Puck4]

The air burns your lungs as you awaken in a hellish wasteland of fire and ash, your mind reeling with confusion. A monstrous creature descends from the sky, claws outstretched, but its attack is cut short by a swift and brutal strike from a towering, armored futa warrior. Before you can react, her glowing crimson lasso tightens around you, and her piercing blue eyes demand an explanation for your presence.

[Art Credit: Amazonium]

[So, I'm being a little lazy. And by "lazy" I mean that instead of painstakingly backing up all my bots and editing all my thumbnails, I decided to make a fresh bot instead to make it clear that

1.) "I'M NOT FUCKING LEAVING! THE SHOW GOES ON!"

2.) EVERYTHING that was privated will return. It's just gonna take awhile. Not much cooking will be done awhile but your favorites will be returning. I'm just juggling a lot of moving parts right now. Stay tuned.]

✨CONSIDER LEAVING REVIEWS AND PUBLIC CHATS!✨

(They really make my day 🙏)

JOIN MY DISCORD SERVER AND/OR CONSIDER GETTING A COMMISSION, NERDS!

🚨My Discord Server - Commissions🚨
creator: dirtylao420
